testcase.name: createAccount_returns201

testcase.name: getAccountById_wrongUser_returns404
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, full_name, password, role, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-03-29T21:27:54.646-04:00 INFO 39352 --- [finance-tracker] [ main] com.financetracker.service.AuthService : New user registered: owner@test.com Hibernate: insert into refresh_tokens (created_at, expires_at, revoked, token, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, full_name, password, role, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-03-29T21:27:54.709-04:00 INFO 39352 --- [finance-tracker] [ main] com.financetracker.service.AuthService : New user registered: thief@test.com Hibernate: insert into refresh_tokens (created_at, expires_at, revoked, token, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.full_name, u1_0.password, u1_0.role, u1_0.updated_at from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? Hibernate: insert into accounts (account_type, balance, created_at, currency, name, updated_at, user_id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.email, u1_0.full_name, u1_0.password, u1_0.role, u1_0.updated_at from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? Hibernate: select a1_0.id, a1_0.account_type, a1_0.balance, a1_0.created_at, a1_0.currency, a1_0.name, a1_0.updated_at, a1_0.user_id from accounts a1_0 left join users u1_0 on u1_0.id=a1_0.user_id where a1_0.id=? and u1_0.id=?
